name: Demonite Ore
tooltip: A dark ore from the Corruption.

name: Hellstone
tooltip: Burns to the touch. Found in the Underworld.

name: Obsidian
tooltip: Created where water and lava meet.

name: Gel
tooltip: A gooey substance used for torches.

name: Terra Blade
tooltip: A powerful sword that shoots sword beams.

name: Influx Waver
tooltip: Summons a portal after hitting enemies.

name: Vortex Beater
tooltip: Has a chance to shoot homing rockets.

name: Space Gun
tooltip: Cost no mana when full Meteor Armor is worn.

name: Golden Shower
tooltip: Sprays Ichor to reduce enemy defense.

name: Last Prism
tooltip: Fires a beam of pure light.

name: Slime Staff
tooltip: Summons a baby slime to fight for you.

name: Spider Staff
tooltip: Summons spiders to fight for you.

name: Pygmy Staff
tooltip: Summons a pygmy to fight for you.

name: Meteor Helmet
tooltip: Set bonus: Space Gun costs no mana.

name: Turtle Helmet
tooltip: Part of Turtle Armor. Reflects damage.

name: Hermes Boots
tooltip: Allows the wearer to run super fast.

name: Cloud in a Bottle
tooltip: Allows the wearer to double jump.

name: Obsidian Shield
tooltip: Provides immunity to knockback and fire blocks.

name: Celestial Shell
tooltip: Provides many powerful bonuses. Transforms at night.

name: Lightning Boots
tooltip: Allows super fast running and flight.

name: Fishron Wings
tooltip: Super fast flight. Even faster in water.

name: Chlorophyte Ore
tooltip: A powerful ore that grows in the Jungle.

name: Luminite
tooltip: A powerful ore from Moon Lord.

name: Soul of Might
tooltip: The essence of a powerful creature.

name: Soul of Sight
tooltip: The essence of an all-seeing creature.

name: Soul of Fright
tooltip: The essence of a terrifying creature.

name: Soul of Light
tooltip: The essence of a hallowed creature.

name: Soul of Night
tooltip: The essence of a corrupt creature.

name: Jungle Spores
tooltip: Spores that grow in the Jungle.

name: Pwnhammer
tooltip: Smashes Demon Altars. Unlocks Hardmode ores.

name: Drax
tooltip: Can mine all ores. Also functions as an axe.

name: Worm Food
tooltip: Summons the Eater of Worlds in the Corruption.

name: Bloody Spine
tooltip: Summons the Brain of Cthulhu in the Crimson.

name: Abeemination
tooltip: Summons the Queen Bee anywhere in the Jungle.

name: Guide Voodoo Doll
tooltip: The Guide is effigy-like. Toss into lava in the Underworld.

name: Truffle Worm
tooltip: Use as fishing bait in the Ocean to summon Duke Fishron.

name: Gelatin Crystal
tooltip: Summons the Queen Slime in the Hallow.

name: Lihzahrd Power Cell
tooltip: Used on the Lihzahrd Altar to summon Golem.

name: Celestial Sigil
tooltip: Summons Moon Lord without defeating the Celestial Pillars.

name: Regeneration Potion
tooltip: Greatly increases life regeneration for 5 minutes.

name: Swiftness Potion
tooltip: Increases movement speed by 25% for 4 minutes.

name: Archery Potion
tooltip: +20% arrow speed and +10% damage for 4 minutes.

name: Water Bolt
tooltip: Shoots a projectile that bounces off walls.

name: Starfury
tooltip: Stars fall from the sky when swung.

name: Bee Armor
tooltip: Set bonus: Summons bees when damaged.

name: Beetle Scale Mail
tooltip: Defense set: reduces damage taken over time.

name: Beetle Shell
tooltip: Offense set: boosts melee damage over time.

name: Beetle Husk
tooltip: A husk from a Golem beetle.

name: Grappling Hook
tooltip: Use this to latch on to blocks.

name: Ice Mirror
tooltip: Teleports you home. Found in Frozen Chests.

name: Cross Necklace
tooltip: Doubles the duration of invincibility after being struck.

name: Flairon
tooltip: Shoots a flail that releases bubbles.

name: Bubble Gun
tooltip: Shoots bubbles that home in on enemies.

name: Cobwhip
tooltip: A whip made of cobwebs. Summons a spider tag effect on hit.

name: Slime Whip
tooltip: Leaves a slime blob on hit that slows enemies.

name: Soulscourge
tooltip: A whip forged from Demonite. Inflicts Cursed Inferno.

name: Vasculash
tooltip: A whip forged from Crimtane. Inflicts Ichor.

name: Starcrash
tooltip: Calls down fallen stars on the last struck enemy.

name: Vulgar Display of Flower
tooltip: Releases spores that home in on tagged enemies.

name: Electric Eel
tooltip: Shoots lightning bolts that chain between tagged enemies.

name: Constellation
tooltip: Summons stardust explosions on the last enemy hit.

name: Possession
tooltip: Briefly possesses the last struck enemy to fight for you.

name: Flint
tooltip: A flint dagger from another dimension. Quick melee strikes.

name: Barrel Launcher
tooltip: Launches explosive barrels. Dead Cells crossover item.

name: Killing Deck
tooltip: Draws random cards with varying magical effects.

name: Mushroom Staff
tooltip: Summons Mushroom Boi minions that fight for you.

name: Barnacle Staff
tooltip: Summons floating Barnacle sentries that spit poison.

name: Ram Rune
tooltip: Hold Down + Jump in midair to perform a ground slam.

name: Cattiva
tooltip: Summons a Cattiva that fights and auto-mines nearby blocks.

name: Foxparks
tooltip: Summons a Foxparks that fires fireballs or a flamethrower.

name: Digtoise
tooltip: Autonomously tunnels a 3-wide passage when used.

name: Chillet
tooltip: Mount. +10% weapon damage, dash attack, 46 mph speed.

name: Chillet Ignis
tooltip: Fire-type mount. +10% weapon damage, dash attack, 46 mph speed.

name: Glowing Mushroom
tooltip: A luminous mushroom. Grows in the Glowing Mushroom biome.

name: Cobweb
tooltip: A sticky web. Found throughout caves.

name: Chain
tooltip: A chain used in many crafting recipes.

name: Fallen Star
tooltip: Falls from the sky at night. Used in many crafting recipes.

name: Mushroom Grass Seeds
tooltip: Used to grow Glowing Mushroom Biomes.

name: Prospector Helmet
tooltip: Part of Prospector Armor. Boosts mining speed.

name: Cobalt Ore
tooltip: The first Hardmode ore. Appears after breaking Demon Altars.

name: Orichalcum Ore
tooltip: Second-tier Hardmode ore. Alternate to Mythril.

name: Titanium Ore
tooltip: Third-tier Hardmode ore. Alternate to Adamantite.

tooltip: A bar of tin. Alternate to Copper.

tooltip: A bar of lead. Alternate to Iron.

tooltip: A bar of Orichalcum. Alternate to Mythril.

tooltip: A bar of Titanium. Alternate to Adamantite.

tooltip: A rare feather from an Ice Golem.

tooltip: Part of Platinum Armor. Alternate to Gold.

tooltip: Drills through Hardmode ores up to Adamantite.

tooltip: Drills through all ores except Chlorophyte.
